  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AlertManager
    Manages budget alert notifications for the user.
    AlertManager.AlertCallback
    Callback interface for receiving alert events.
    AuthActivity
    The authentication screen of the Masroofy application.
    BudgetCycle
    Represents a single budget cycle for a user.
    BudgetManager
    Central controller that manages all budget-related operations for the application.
    Category
    Represents a spending category used to classify expenses.
    CycleDAO
    Data Access Object for budget cycle persistence.
    CycleSetupActivity
    Screen for initializing a new budget cycle.
    DashboardActivity
    The main dashboard screen of the Masroofy application.
    DashboardModel
    Immutable model representing the data displayed on the Dashboard screen.
    DatabaseManager
    Manages the SQLite database connection and schema initialization.
    Expense
    Represents a single expense entry recorded by the user.
    ExpenseController
    Controller responsible for processing expense transactions.
    ExpenseController.ExpenseResult
    Represents the outcome of processing an expense.
    ExpensesEntryActivity
    A dialog window that allows the user to enter and submit a new expense.
    HistoryActivity
    A window that displays historical expense transactions.
    main
    Entry point for the Masroofy budgeting application.
    PinActivity
    PinActivity — kept for backward compatibility.
    PinSetupActivity
    PinSetupActivity — Sign Up screen.
    ReportController
    Controller responsible for generating budget reports and spending summaries.
    SpendingChart
    A custom Swing panel that renders a pie chart of spending by category.
    TransactionAdapter
    A Swing TableModel adapter for displaying a list of Expense objects in a JTable.
    TransactionDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing expense transaction records in the database.
    UserDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for managing user PIN records in the database.
